[[File:Scorching bow detail.png|left|140px]]
The '''scorching bow''' is a [[demonbane weapon]] requiring level 77 [[Ranged]] to wield. It is made by using a [[tormented synapse]] on a [[magic longbow (u)]]. This requires level 74 [[Fletching]] (boostable) and having read [[Duradel's notes]] after completion of [[While Guthix Sleeps]].

The bow, able to fire arrows up to [[dragon arrows]], has a 30% accuracy and damage bonus against [[Demon (attribute)|demonic]] creatures. Similar to the [[dragon hunter crossbow]], the damage bonus is applied additively with the 15% damage boost from a [[Slayer helmet (i)]] or [[black mask (i)]], resulting in a total damage boost of 45%.

The process to create the scorching bow can be reversed via the 'Revert' option, returning only the tormented synapse as a result. A [[player killer]] will receive the synapse from their opponent if it is not one of their protected items.

The scorching bow cannot be used to light a fire with [[Barbarian Training#Firemaking|Barbarian Firemaking]].

==Special attack==
[[File:Scorching shackles.gif|thumb|300px|A player performing the scorching bow's special attack, ''Scorching shackles''.]]
The scorching bow has a [[special attack]], ''Scorching shackles'', which drains 25% of the player's special attack energy.

''Scorching shackles'' binds [[Demon (attribute)|demons]] for 20 ticks (12 seconds), dealing 1 [[burn]] damage in the process. It deals an additional 1 burn damage every 4 ticks (2.4 seconds), for a total of 5 burn damage.<!--The in-game tooltip mentions it having "30% bonus accuracy" as well, though this appears to be referring to the bow's native 30% demonbane bonus since the special attack only affects demons.-->

Against non-demonic creatures, attempting to use the special attack results in the message {{mes|Scorching shackles won't work against a non-demon enemy.}}

==Creation==
Below the required level, a message will appear stating ''"You attempt to string the bow, but burn yourself in the process. You'll need a Fletching level of 74 to craft a scorching bow."'' This will deal 4 damage to the player, but cannot kill them; attempting to make the bow without the Fletching level and having less than 6 hitpoints will prompt the character to state ''"I'm not sure I want to try that when I'm this injured."''

The first scorching bow created on an [[account]] grants 730 Fletching experience, whilst subsequent ones grant 73 experience afterwards.
